description:
Professional lighting and sensor planning

Standard-compliant planning and simulation of artificial light, daylight and sensors in real time. For beginners and professionals in lighting planning. Intuitive operation, simple and fast display of the calculation values.
ADDED

Live filtering of item names in scene and building tree.
Possibility to change luminaire type properties during active Realtime Rendering.

CHANGED

Optimised sport arrangements.
Add new sport areas for UFR value calculation.
Limit selection list for combination lum. for better overview.
Names of combination childs in luminaire list.
Optional number of digits with leading zeros for group objects for better sorting.
Overview printout also for empty evaluation areas.
Option to display the name of custom standards on the overview printout.

FIXED

Removed unused checkbox from properties dialog.
Fixed rounding of vertical MAUR values.
Crash when deleting subelements of combination luminaires.
Wrong position of first element in sports arrangement.
ReluxTunnel: Print output now works even if the first stage is not calculated.
Wrong direction printout for TI Observers with various directions.
Type change in  simple mirror groups was missing.
Licences hosted on licence servers in different subnets were not always displayed on the licence page. (But they still could be allocated).
Custom utilisation profiles (custom standards) from ReluxDesktop versions prior to 2026.1 could not be read.
Bug in reading IES photometry B files.
Non-printing of customized project-specific task area names.
Non-function DGP calculation.
Missing call of cleanup functionality when closing the application.
Floor plan clipped in print preview.
Potential crash when deleting or swapping luminaires of a library luminaire combination.
Flawed clipping planes leading to disappearing background images.
Missing support of luminaire aiming operation in interactive sport mode.
Missing vector offset for certain illuminance results in outputs.
Street module excel export bug which caused exported excel file to be unreadable.
Mangled strings in LDC print output.
Save the luminaire list viewbar state.
Luminance (cd/m²) color distributions now displays correctly on surfaces within your 3D views.
